body:
Features: * Small performance improvements (Terminal, Editor) * Improve arm32 and loongarch support (CPU, Linux) * Ignore the parent process if env `$FFTS_IGNORE_PARENT` is set to `1` (Shell) * Add code name of Apple M4 (CPU, Linux) * Add ethernet speed rate detection support (LocalIP) * Add zsh completion script * Add Linglong package manager detection support (Packages, Linux) Bugfixes: * Fix building on macOS 10.14 * Fix tmux in linux TTY (Colors) * Fix hang in WSL when custom format is used (Disk, Linux) * Fix `/proc/loadavg` parsing (Loadavg, Linux) * Disable use of `LC_NUMERIC` locale settings to fix parsing of decimal numbers * Fix possible segfault (DiskIO, Linux) * Honor `preciseRefreshRate` in custom format (Display) Logos: * Add Lingmo OS * Add Sleeper OS ---
